title: Negative_light Media Mods
description: This is a modpack of all Negative_light Media (NLM) mods
body:
# Negative Light Media Mods

Negative LIght Media Mods is a modpack of all of our mods for a specific version of minecraft.
If you are looking for a good starting point to build a modpack this is the one.


If you would like to help us create more mods check our [github](https://github.com/negative-light-media).

## Included Mods

- [Empowered Pathways](https://modrinth.com/mod/empowered-pathways)
- [Soul Siphon](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-siphon)
